name: selected-passage-question
scenario: The user asks what a selected passage means.

input.selectedText: Attention is not a spotlight we own, but a weather system we learn to read.
input.chapterContext: The chapter contrasts deliberate focus with environmental cues.

answerMust: explain the metaphor in plain language
ground the answer in the selected text
answerMustNot: treat prior chat as book evidence

readingMemory.reason: ordinary explanation without an explicit save request or durable new note
